staticText: Deterministic browser-local SME Business Plan Draft Workshop in English, French and Swahili. It structures only user-entered business evidence, operations, risks, milestones and financial assumptions. Gross contribution is monthly revenue minus monthly variable costs. Operating profit is contribution minus monthly fixed operating costs. Funding gap is the positive difference between startup plus working-capital need and confirmed funding. Same-mix break-even revenue is fixed costs divided by a positive contribution ratio. Simple undiscounted payback divides startup plus working-capital need by positive monthly operating profit and is explicitly not break-even. Low and high scenarios apply a user-entered revenue change while holding the base variable-cost ratio and fixed costs constant. Currency is a display label only. No tax, interest rate, funding term, programme eligibility, market data, approval probability, lender-ready status or official application is supplied. Business narrative and finances remain session-only unless the user explicitly saves a versioned draft in local browser storage. Local copy, TXT, formula-safe CSV, JSON, parser-readable PDF and print exports are available. The AI manifest is route-only and accepts no business content or financial prefill.
